text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as we stroll through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I sense trouble and it's big! In other words, the
perfect opportunity for a class representative to
step in!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's just a raffle! If that's trouble, it's hardly
a problem at all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I actually happen to have a raffle ticket
with me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My classmate gave it to me. She said I'd probably
like it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
She also said it was easy to imagine me wrangling
the raffle spinner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just another example of my daily efforts as class
representative being appreciated!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Now, I'm going to try my luck at the raffle! I've
only got one shot at this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Every prize will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, at least one grand prize. I will not fail!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As you can see, I am very well-behaved! The god
of raffles will not abandon me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day! O spirit whose love is endless
for class representatives! Look favorably upon
this exemplary class representative before y—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Understood! Here I go! Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I quell Sakura Bakushin O's desire to run a bit
too wild, we grasp the lever together and turn the
tumbler.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoooaa! We got the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So what's next?! Why aren't there more balls
where that came from?!
choice_data_list: One grand prize is more than enough!
One grand prize is more than enough!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now that you mention it, you're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, a class representative like myself would
excel at winning at raffles too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That I am! Turns out my luck is in the upper ranks!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm not surprised that even raffle prizes are drawn
to someone with as much charisma as myself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is it my imagination, or... doesn't this ball look
quite cute?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Is it okay if I keep it in my room as a
pet?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I'm joking! My good sense of humor is
always ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: And now I shall give this coupon to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I still have a lot more things to do as class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There is no time to spare getting relaxed,
refreshed, or toasty!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Should there come a time in society where class
representatives are made obsolete by their
exceedingly exemplary status, then I'll visit the
hot springs.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I believe you will know when that time has come!
Please, let me task you with this duty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm not sure what she means, but I'll hold onto
the coupon for her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoa! This is great! And it's deluxe too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It says deluxe, but this goes beyond first class! It's
the kind of thing you'd see at a fine dining spot!
This is a hamburger steak practically made for
class representatives!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
One class representative plus one hamburger
steak perfectly suited for class representatives.
There's only one outcome here...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: TO EAT!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Whoops. I'll save you a bite, of course!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sharing is caring. That's the slogan our class has
chosen for this month!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: One class representative plus one hamburger steak perfectly suited for class representatives plus the trainer who's always looking out for me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With a lineup like this, there's no doubt this
deluxe hamburger steak will be dined upon in an
exemplary fashion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Sakura Bakushin O's kindness, I'm able
to enjoy the taste of luxury with her.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wow, a bushel! That has a good ring to it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The bigger things are, the better!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm a little stumped as to how I'll be
able to finish all of this.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! So that's what I'm supposed to do with them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Cooking is all about making the ingredients
tastier, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That means these carrots have been waiting for
me to make them into a delicious sensation!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Just leave it to me! I, Sakura Bakushin O, will put
my title as class representative at stake!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will have you all transform into the tastiest little
treats!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm a bit uneasy, so I decide to help her cook
when the time comes.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Just one carrot, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh?! What if there's a big secret hiding inside?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It may look like just one carrot... but perhaps it's
symbolic?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm! On closer inspection, the shape seems to
have some kind of meaning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For this prize to be bestowed onto a class
representative, there's no way it can be an
ordinary carrot!
choice_data_list: ...Did you watch that detective show yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How did you know?! Looks like there was a
detective right under my nose!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Who can reveal the secrets of this carrot,
Detective Class Representative or Detective
Trainer? Let the game begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back, we fervently discuss the
meaning of that single carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ack! T-tissues?! And it's the consolation prize?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...N-no! There's simply no way I would become the
recipient of a simple pack of tissues!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's a measly participation trophy!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I got one of those in the town's trivia contest
when I was a kid... And the marathon
tournament... And every other tournament I stood
in as class representative...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I've received a lot of tissues! The ultimate
participation award!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So these tissues must be a good thing... Right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... back then, I wasn't super thrilled
about the tissues either...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But I was the only one to get that award... Wait?
Didn't the other kids get them too?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait... huh? Hm? Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O agonizes in her mind, at a loss
for words...
